---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Title
<Short, clear description of the work>

---

## Summary
Describe what this issue is about in a few sentences.

- What problem are we solving?
- Why is this needed now?

---

## Context
Provide any relevant background:

- Related feature or milestone:
- Related issues:
- Current behaviour:
- Desired behaviour:

---

## Objectives
- List the key outcomes this issue should achieve
- Focus on user/system value, not implementation details

---

## Scope

### In Scope
- What will be implemented in this issue

### Out of Scope
- What will NOT be implemented (important to prevent scope creep)

---

## Proposed Approach
High-level approach only (no detailed code design required):

- Describe the intended solution direction
- Mention any constraints or design principles
- Reference existing components if relevant

---

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature behaves as expected
- [ ] No regression in existing functionality
- [ ] Solution builds successfully
- [ ] Changes are consistent with existing architecture
- [ ] Code is readable and maintainable

(Add feature-specific criteria as needed)

---

## Technical Notes
Optional implementation guidance:

- Relevant models/services:
- Areas of the codebase affected:
- Known constraints:
- Edge cases to consider:

---

## Risks / Considerations
- Any potential risks or trade-offs
- Areas that may require extra review

---

## Testing Notes
- How should this be validated?
- Manual steps / scenarios
- Any future automated tests to consider

---

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code implemented
- [ ] Reviewed locally
- [ ] Committed to feature branch
- [ ] PR created targeting `dev`
- [ ] PR reviewed and approved
- [ ] Merged into `dev`

---

## Notes
Any additional information or follow-ups.
